subtitles.original: 確かな根を生やす
subtitles.english: and grow deep, certain roots.

subtitles.original: 嵐の夜が来たとしても
subtitles.english: Even if a stormy night comes,

subtitles.original: 揺らいだりはしない
subtitles.english: I will not waver.

subtitles.original: 何度でも
subtitles.english: Time and time again...

subtitles.original: 追い付いたり 追い越したり
subtitles.english: chasing and surpassing you,

subtitles.original: キミがふいに分かんなくなって
subtitles.english: whenever I suddenly lose sight of you.

subtitles.original: 息をしたタイミングが
subtitles.english: Just having our breathing

subtitles.original: 合うだけで嬉しくなったりして
subtitles.english: align makes me feel so happy.

subtitles.original: 集めた一秒を
subtitles.english: Can I turn this second I've gathered

subtitles.original: 永遠にして
subtitles.english: into an eternity

subtitles.original: 行けるかな
subtitles.english: as I move forward?

subtitles.original: 僕の声が響いた
subtitles.english: The moment my voice resounded,

subtitles.original: 瞬間に始まる
subtitles.english: everything began.

subtitles.original: 命のリミット
subtitles.english: My heart is counting down

subtitles.original: 心臓がカウントしてる
subtitles.english: the limit of my life.

subtitles.original: 叶えても 叶えても
subtitles.english: No matter how many wishes come true,

subtitles.original: 終わらない願い
subtitles.english: they never truly end.

subtitles.original: 汗をかいて走った
subtitles.english: Drenched in sweat, I ran forward.

subtitles.original: 世界の秒針が
subtitles.english: One day, the clock hands of this world

subtitles.original: いつか止まった
subtitles.english: will leave me behind

subtitles.original: 僕を置いていく
subtitles.english: as I stand frozen.

subtitles.original: あと何回キミと笑えるの？
subtitles.english: How many more times can I laugh with you?

subtitles.original: 試してるんだ 僕を
subtitles.english: It's testing me...

subtitles.original: Catch the Moment
subtitles.english: Catch the moment!

subtitles.original: 逃さないよ 僕は snuff
subtitles.english: I won't let it slip away.

subtitles.original: この瞬間を掴め
subtitles.english: I'll seize this moment!

subtitles.original: Catch the Moment
subtitles.english: Catch the moment!

subtitles.original: こんばんドドドー！
subtitles.english: Good evening-dododo!

subtitles.original: お誕生日を2回迎えることとなった角巻わためです！
subtitles.english: This is Tsunomaki Watame, who gets to celebrate her birthday twice!

subtitles.original: 本当は6月6日がお誕生日なんですけど、不具合が多くて中断、そして延期になり…
subtitles.english: Actually, my birthday is June 6th, but due to many technical issues, it was cut short and postponed...

subtitles.original: 今日！角巻わため生誕祭2026「アニソンナイトフィーバー2」を改めて開催させていただくことになりました！
subtitles.english: And today! We are holding Tsunomaki Watame's Birthday Celebration 2026 "Anisong Night Fever 2" once again!

subtitles.original: 迅速に動いてくださった運営さんたち！
subtitles.english: Huge thanks to the staff members who took action so quickly!

subtitles.original: そしてライブを見に来てくれている皆さん！本当にありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: And to everyone who came to watch the live show! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: 1曲目「革命デュアリズム」、2曲目「Catch the Moment」と見ていただいて、分かった方もいらっしゃるかもしれないんですが
subtitles.english: Since you've watched the 1st song "Kakumei Dualism" and 2nd song "Catch the Moment", some of you might have noticed...

subtitles.original: 前回のライブで放送した部分は、万が一のために録画を回してくださっていたので
subtitles.english: The parts broadcast during the previous live show were recorded just in case.

subtitles.original: そちらの6月6日のバキバキ生誕当日のパフォーマンスを見ていただいて
subtitles.english: So, you got to watch those high-energy performances recorded on my actual birthday, June 6th.

subtitles.original: それ以外のソロ、MCは、改めてこれ以上ライブ延期にならないように
subtitles.english: As for the other solos and MC parts, to prevent any further postponements,

subtitles.original: 今回は事前に収録をさせていただきました！
subtitles.english: we pre-recorded them this time!

subtitles.original: なので、未来のリアルタイムのみんなのコメントを予知しながらMCしたいなと思いますので、いっぱいコメントしてください！
subtitles.english: So, I'll be doing my MC while predicting everyone's real-time comments from the future, so please leave lots of comments!

subtitles.original: うんうん、分かったよ。はい、はい、うん。
subtitles.english: Yeah, I see. Okay, okay, uh-huh.

subtitles.original: あ、ありがとね。おめでとう？ありがとう！見える、見えるぞ！
subtitles.english: Oh, thank you. "Happy birthday"? Thank you! I can see them, I can see them!

subtitles.original: あはははは！ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Ahahaha! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: 説明はここまで！ここからはいつものライブ！
subtitles.english: That's it for the explanation! From here on, it's our usual live show!

subtitles.original: 今日は生誕ライブなので、たくさんこのライブに向けて準備や練習を本当にたくさんしてきました！
subtitles.english: Since today is my birthday live, I've put in an absolute ton of preparation and practice for this!

subtitles.original: ぜひ最後まで楽しんで、そしていっぱいお祝いしてもらえると嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: I hope you enjoy it to the very end and celebrate a lot with me!

subtitles.original: 本日のハッシュタグはこちら！
subtitles.english: Here is today's hashtag!

subtitles.original: 6月6日と変わらず、「#角巻わため生誕祭2026」になりますので、たくさんスクショとか、感想とか、ポストしてください！
subtitles.english: It's the same as June 6th: "#TsunomakiWatameBirthdayCelebration2026", so please post lots of screenshots and impressions!

subtitles.original: 目指せ、またトレンド、1位！
subtitles.english: Let's aim for the number one trending spot again!

subtitles.original: あとでじっくりねっとり、わためも見に行きたいと思ってますので、よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: Watame will be checking them out thoroughly and deeply later, so thank you!

subtitles.original: ということで、ここまでT.M.Revolutionさんの「革命デュアリズム」、ソードアート・オンラインの「Catch the Moment」と歌わせていただいたんですが
subtitles.english: So, I've sung T.M.Revolution's "Kakumei Dualism" and Sword Art Online's "Catch the Moment"...

subtitles.original: アニメや原曲MVに関連している演出を入れ込んだりしているので、みんな分かったかな？
subtitles.english: We've incorporated references to the anime and the original music videos in the staging, so did you all catch them?

subtitles.original: たぶん、わためいとなら分かったかな？
subtitles.english: I bet the Watamates noticed them, right?

subtitles.original: ぜひ細かいところまで見てもらえると嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: I'd be glad if you check out all the small details!

subtitles.original: ここからはゲストパートもあります！
subtitles.english: From here on, we also have the guest part!

subtitles.original: みんなの好きなアニソンも出てくるかも？
subtitles.english: Some of your favorite anisongs might pop up!

subtitles.original: ということで、ゲストパート、盛り上がっていきましょう！
subtitles.english: So, let's keep the excitement going for the guest part!

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation Summary**

Alright, let's get down to brass tacks. I need to generate synchronized subtitles for this Watame video, focusing on that "Catch the Moment" performance and subsequent chat. I've got the timestamp schema locked in and ready to roll.

First, the song. I'm going to start by transcribing and translating each segment of the lyrics, down to the millisecond. Let's see... the opening line is "確かな根を生やす" (tashika na ne o hayasu), which translates to "grow a certain, deep root," starting precisely at 00:00.000.  Then it's a matter of meticulous listening and timestamping: "嵐の夜が来たとしても" (arashi no yoru ga kita toshitemo) from 00:02.700, "揺らいだりはしない" (yuraidari wa shinai) at 00:09.100, and so on.  I'll continue this painstaking process through the whole song, including the instrumental sections, ensuring every lyric aligns perfectly with the audio. I've noted that the song goes until 02:04.000.

Next up, the talking portion.  This requires a more nuanced approach. I'll need to listen carefully to Watame's speech from 02:04.000 to 05:03.000, transcribing her words and translating them accurately. I'll pay close attention to the context, intonation, and any subtle nuances in her speech, like the "こんばんドドドー！" (Konban-dododo!) at 02:04, to make sure the subtitles capture the essence of what she's saying. I'm noting the birthday event, which was twice delayed, and the comments for the livestream.

During the transcription, I'll need to parse her references to other songs. Ah, she mentions she sang "1曲目 革命デュアリズム", which is indeed "Kakumei Dualism".  I need to ensure that the translation of this song name is correct in the subtitles. I've also verified this "Kakumei Dualism" for my own sanity.

Let's not forget the hashtags for the birthday event!

I have to carefully double-check all the timestamps and details for accuracy.  I want to make sure I get that first line's starting point exactly on time. I am now confirming all the final translation entries. I think all the translations are good.

Finally, I'll package everything into the correct JSON format. The final output is ready. Done.
